subject: FW: Stem Cell Research
body:
From: Mulhare, Shelby [mailto:SMulhare@islecap.com] 
Sent: Thursday, January 24, 2008 11:18 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: FW: Stem Cell Research

 

Hi Leslie,

 

Below is the email that Andrew sent out and attached is the invite.

 

Thanks,

Shelby

 

________________________________

From: Mulhare, Shelby On Behalf Of RSVP
Sent: Thursday, January 24, 2008 11:14 AM
To: Mulhare, Shelby
Subject: FW: Stem Cell Research

 

 

Attached is an invitation to a small event that Tony & Shelly Malkin and
Sandi and  I have planned for 1/29/08.  It will only take an hour.
Sandi and I have been very involved in the promotion of stem cell
medical research for some time now.  It is my fervent belief that this
particular body of science has amongst the highest probabilities of
delivering actual cures, in our lifetime, for many of the most difficult
diseases in the world.  Because there is an absolute prohibition on
government funding, this promising technology must rely solely on the
vision and commitment of private individuals.  

 

While Sandi and I have made the Harvard Stem Cell institue, its director
Dr. Doug Melton and their work our single highest philanthropic
priority, it does not mean that you will.  I ask only that you take an
hour to listen to what it is that is being done at Harvard and what
advancements have been made and continue to be made regularly.  We will
solicit no money at this event; just have a drink with us and listen for
30 minutes to what is possible with this science and where it is
leading.  It would mean a great deal to me.  I suspect it may mean a
great deal to you too.  Please RSVP to david Dowling at ddowling
@islecap.com or 212-705-5010.  Thanks.

________________________________

 

The information contained in this message and any attachment to it may
be privileged, confidential or otherwise protected from disclosure. If
you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any
dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly
prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please
notify the sender immediately by replying to the message and please
delete it from your system. Please also note that any views or opinions
presented in this email are solely those of the author and do not
necessarily represent those of the company.
body_html:
From: Mulhare, Shelby [mailto:SMulhare@islecap.com]
Sent: Thursday, January 24, 2008 11:18 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: FW: Stem Cell Research

 

Hi Leslie,

 

Below is the email that Andrew sent out and attached is the invite.

 

Thanks,

Shelby

 

From: Mulhare, Shelby On Behalf Of RSVP
Sent: Thursday, January 24, 2008 11:14 AM
To: Mulhare, Shelby
Subject: FW: Stem Cell Research

 

 

Attached is an invitation to a small event that Tony & Shelly Malkin and Sandi and  I have planned for 1/29/08.  It will only take an hour.  Sandi and I have been very involved in the promotion of stem cell medical research for some time now.  It is my fervent belief that this particular body of science has amongst the highest probabilities of delivering actual cures, in our lifetime, for many of the most difficult diseases in the world.  Because there is an absolute prohibition on government funding, this promising technology must rely solely on the vision and commitment of private individuals. 

 

While Sandi and I have made the Harvard Stem Cell institue, its director Dr. Doug Melton and their work our single highest philanthropic priority, it does not mean that you will.  I ask only that you take an hour to listen to what it is that is being done at Harvard and what advancements have been made and continue to be made regularly.  We will solicit no money at this event; just have a drink with us and listen for 30 minutes to what is possible with this science and where it is leading.  It would mean a great deal to me.  I suspect it may mean a great deal to you too.  Please RSVP to david Dowling at ddowling @islecap.com or 212-705-5010.  Thanks.

 

The information contained in this message and any attachment to it may be privileged, confidential or otherwise protected from disclosure. If you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please notify the sender immediately by replying to the message and please delete it from your system. Please also note that any views or opinions presented in this email are solely those of the author and do not necessarily represent those of the company.
